html:
Exclusive to:

The Ancient Guard Tower Pieces are pieces that drops from Ancient Guard Towers. They can be used to craft Guard Tower Kit at the Sanctum Smithy. There are 3 type of pieces and killing all 4 Ancient Guard Towers will drop 1 Guard Tower Core, 1 Spark Socket and 2 Cranky Articulators that are enough to make a Guard Tower Kit.

The Ancient Guard Tower Pieces can be traded with Pig King for 15 Gold Nuggets, or be tribute to Antlion to delay its timer for 6 days.

Usage

×2

Trivia

  • The Ancient Guard Tower Pieces were introduced in the Cursed Confrontation Part 1 update.

Exclusive to:
“This must be an important piece of that walking tower.”
–Wilson
“Great, now where does it go?”
–Willow
“This must belong to big brick guy.”
–Wolfgang
“I'm not the only one missing pieces.”
–Wendy
“SENTRY UNIT COMPONENT”
–WX-78
“This is obviously a component of the ancient security tower.”
–Wickerbottom
“Must be a part for that stone hoser”
–Woodie
“That blasted tower needs so many parts.”
–Maxwell
“Behöld! A piece öf the gölem!”
–Wigfrid
“What does it do?”
–Webber
“Ah yes, an ingredient for the tower!”
–Warly
“For tall friend”
–Wormwood
“Looks like that lumbering tower of bricks needs this to lumber.”
–Winona
“It won't start until it has every part.”
–Wortox
“Me always have spare parts.”
–Wurt
“It's a part to build the tower robot, Woby!”
–Walter
“Intricate, not unlike the parts of my clock.”
–Wanda
The Ancient Guard Tower Pieces are pieces that drops from Ancient Guard Towers. They can be used to craft Guard Tower Kit at the Sanctum Smithy. There are 3 type of pieces and killing all 4 Ancient Guard Towers will drop 1 Guard Tower Core, 1 Spark Socket and 2 Cranky Articulators that are enough to make a Guard Tower Kit.
The Ancient Guard Tower Pieces can be traded with Pig King for 15 Gold Nuggets, or be tribute to Antlion to delay its timer for 6 days.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Mảnh Tháp Bảo Vệ Cổ là những mảnh rơi ra từ Tháp Bảo Vệ Cổ. Chúng có thể được sử dụng để chế tạo Bộ Tháp Bảo Vệ tại Lò rèn Sanctum. Có 3 loại mảnh và tiêu diệt cả 4 Tháp Bảo vệ Cổ sẽ rơi ra 1 Lõi Tháp Bảo vệ, 1 Ổ cắm Tia lửa và 2 Bộ khớp nối Cranky đủ để tạo ra Bộ Tháp Bảo vệ.
